rows.content: Wildcards may be used to bring a selection list of files that may
be converted one by one.  If a selection list is used, then the
destination file information is asked for again before the
Used to specify a profile other than the default.  If none is
specified, than the file is loaded as based upon the file's
extension.  If a profile is specified and file list is
generated, then all files that are selected for conversion
NAME+- Specifies the name of the file to convert the SOURCE
file to.  If a full pathname is not specified, then the file
is written to the directory specfied in the CURRENT DIR field.
If a selection list is displayed for files to convert, then
the DESTINATION FILE information on this panel is ignored and
replaced by the info specified during each individual conversion.
